name: Garmin Connect IQ SDK
description: Installs a JDK and the connect-iq-sdk-manager CLI (non-interactive replacement for Garmin's broken SDK Manager GUI), then downloads, license-accepts, and pins a specific Connect IQ SDK version at image build time.

version.description: Connect IQ SDK version to download and pin (e.g. 7.4.0). Must be set explicitly; the install fails if left empty (a container only ever targets one version).
